title: phleum asperum var. japonicum
intro: Phleum asperum var. japonicum, also known as Japanese meadow grass or Japanese blue grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to provide various health benefits, such as reducing stress, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of anxiety and depression. In terms of herbal preparations, Phleum asperum var. japonicum is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety as a medicinal agent.
